rationale: docs/helix/ exists but contains only .gitkeep (no real artifact). T5 has a real prd.md driving the helix-shaped signal; T22 isolates the directory-existence-only case. The repo-shape rule keys on ARTIFACT presence, not directory presence — so this scenario must NOT silently route to helix (and likely must disambiguate, since main.tf is also absent). The fixture pins the signal definition: artifact, not directory.
